plugins.name: autonomy-loop
plugins.description: Builder / reviewer / planner / researcher Claude Code terminals pass a git baton through a deterministic, frozen-invariant gate with an adversarial 5-lens reviewer and a mechanized bite. Presence-driven roles: launch a terminal to add one. A rings + provision-or-refuse security posture (a SessionStart preflight refuses unattended auto-promotion below a hardened trust tier, with a read-only control plane, a sandboxed shell, a repo-scoped credential, and a no-bypass prod ruleset), plus a greenfield mutation-bite, a money-path floor, and a coverage ratchet. Rigor on by default. Hardened across a 181-cycle self-dogfood through v0.8.4.
